system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tonkho_hsd_insert","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_TONKHO_HSD_INSERT]
(
	@mact NVARCHAR(200),
	@soluong DECIMAL(18, 3),
	@hsd DATE
)
AS

--LẤY RA VẬT TƯ THUỘC KHO NÀO
DECLARE @makho NVARCHAR(50)
SELECT @makho = CASE 
    WHEN kho = N'VẬT TƯ KHÁC' THEN 'OTHER'
    WHEN kho = N'HÀNG TRẮNG' THEN 'HTR'
    WHEN kho = N'HÓA CHẤT' THEN 'SON'
    WHEN kho = N'GỖ VÁN' THEN 'GVA'
    WHEN kho = N'NGŨ KIM' THEN 'NKI'
    WHEN kho = N'THÀNH PHẨM' THEN 'GWHS'
    WHEN kho = N'BAO BÌ' THEN 'DGO'
END
FROM tr_material WITH(NOLOCK)
WHERE mavt = @mact

DECLARE @SQL NVARCHAR(MAX)
DECLARE @TMP DECIMAL(18, 3)

SET @SQL = '
SELECT @TMP = soluong 
FROM tr_tonkho_hsd 
WHERE makho = @makho
	AND mact = @mact '
IF @hsd IS NOT NULL
	SET @SQL = @SQL + ' AND hsd =  @hsd'

EXEC sp_executesql @SQL, N'@TMP DECIMAL(18, 3) OUTPUT, @hsd DATE, @makho NVARCHAR(50), @mact NVARCHAR(200)', @TMP OUTPUT, @hsd, @makho, @mact

IF @TMP IS NULL
BEGIN
	INSERT INTO tr_tonkho_hsd
	(
		makho,
		mact,
		soluong,
		hsd
	)
	VALUES
	(
		@makho,
		@mact,
		@soluong,
		@hsd
	)
END
ELSE
BEGIN
	DECLARE @SQL1 NVARCHAR(MAX);
	SET @SQL1 = '
	UPDATE tr_tonkho_hsd
	SET soluong = @TMP + @soluong
	WHERE makho = @makho
		AND mact = @mact '
	IF @hsd IS NOT NULL
		SET @SQL1 = @SQL1 + 'AND hsd = @hsd '
	ELSE
		SET @SQL1 = @SQL1 + 'AND hsd IS NULL '

	EXEC sp_executesql @SQL1, N'@TMP DECIMAL(18, 3), @soluong DECIMAL(18, 3), @makho NVARCHAR(50), @mact NVARCHAR(200), @hsd DATE', @TMP, @soluong, @makho, @mact, @hsd

END

","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_material"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_tonkho_hsd"],"flags":["dynamic-sql"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
